title: SemiVanilla+
description: Lightweight and optimized template modpack for semi-vanilla fabric servers with server utilities such as tpa, vanish, temporary bans, discord link, anti griefing and a few other mods that makes starting out extra convenient.
body:
## DESCRIPTION
 
This is a template modpack for starting a semi-vanilla SMP. It has several optimization mods, carpet mod for fake players, bug fixes, optimizations, and other utility; a tpa mod for teleporting to other players; ban hammer for managing bans and for temporary bans, and discord link mod for connecting the mc chat to discord.

## INSTALLATION GUIDE

1. download the desired .mrpack version
2. go to [this mrpack to zip convertor](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/@master/)
3. upload the file and download the zip
4. inside the zip, you will find the mods folder with all the mods inside
5. copy all the mods from the folder to your server's mods folder

## LIST OF MODS

- Chunky (preloading chunks)
- easyauth (authentication for offline players)
- easywhitelist (name based whitelist)
- fabric carpet (fake players, optimizations and other utlity)
- ledger (logging mod for grief protection)
- Simple Discord Link (discord link)
- Blossom TPA (TPA)
- Blossom Homes (/home)
- BanHammer (ban manager with temporary bans)
- Tablist Health Indicator (for health display in tablist)
- spark (lag profiler)
- cloth-config (API)
- CraterLib (API)
- fabric-api (API)
- Blossom Lib (API)
- fabric-language-kotlin (API)
- very many players (optimization)
- FerriteCore (optimization)
- C2ME (optimization)
- letmedespawn (optimization)
- modernfix (optimization)

## HELPFUL COMMANDS

[ledger](https://www.quiltservertools.net/Ledger/latest/) is a very useful and powerful tool to prevent griefing. I highly reccomend familiarizing yourself with the commands to ensure the safety of the builds in your server. Some helpful commands are:
- `/ledger inspect ~ ~ ~` for checking logs of a block, this can be helpful to check if somebody stole from chests and if somebody griefed
- `/ledger rollback (arguments)` for rollingback certain actions if somebody griefed
- `/ledger search source:player object:deepslate_diamond_ore` this command is extremely helpful to find xrayers if you suspect anybody


- `/vanish` I reccomend using an spectator alt account which is permanently vanished which can be used to catch cheaters and xrayers
- `/log tps` logs tps in tab list (available for all players)
- `/tempban user duration reason` temporarily ban a player
- `/spark profiler open` for opening the spark lag profiler to diagnose causes of lag
- `/auth addToForcedOffline user` if an offline player is using an unavailable username

## OTHER THINGS TO NOTE

- This modpack is for my own smp, croak craft (link of which is on the right side if you are interested)
- for feedback, bug reports, or other help, join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/kk3j3ct6xk) from the links section of this page!
